name: pakistan-drug-registry
title: Pakistan Pharmaceutical Product Registry (RAG Corpus)
description: A retrieval-augmented-generation (RAG) ready corpus of medicines relevant to Pakistan. Two parts: (1) marketed pharmaceutical products with retail prices, pack sizes and availability; (2) Pakistan's National Essential Medicines List (WHO Model List, 23rd List 2023) with therapeutic category, listing type and dosage forms/strengths. Each part ships as JSONL (embeddable passage + structured metadata) plus a flat CSV twin.

resources.name: essential_medicines_rag
resources.description: RAG corpus of Pakistan's National Essential Medicines List. One JSON object per line: {id, text, metadata{medicine, therapeutic_category, subcategory, list_type, dosage_forms, country, source}}. Source: Pakistan gazette S.R.O. 1423(I)/2023 adopting the WHO Model List of Essential Medicines (23rd List, 2023).

resources.name: drug_registry_rag
resources.description: RAG corpus. One JSON object per line: {id, text, metadata{...}}. `text` is a natural-language passage for embedding; `metadata` holds structured fields.

fields.name: text
fields.description: Natural-language passage describing the product, for embedding/retrieval.

fields.name: metadata
fields.description: Structured fields: product_name, company, pack_size, price_before_pkr, discount_percent, price_after_pkr, availability, country, source.
